endpoints.name: GET /api/v2/list-federations
endpoints.description: Returns an array of all the available federations.

endpoints.name: GET /api/v2/list-markets
endpoints.description: Returns an array of all the supported prediction markets

endpoints.name: GET /api/v2/performance-stats
endpoints.description: Returns predictions accuracy in the last 1, 7, 14, 30 days.

endpoints.name: GET /api/v2/predictions
endpoints.description: This endpoint returns by default the next non-expired football predictions. URL parameters can be specified to show specific date in the past or future or to filter by federation and prediction market name.

endpoints.name: GET /api/v2/predictions/{id}
endpoints.description: Returns all predictions available for a match id.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.
